title: K-Anonymity, L-Diversity, and T-Closeness
description: Implement statistical models to prevent re-identification attacks using quasi-identifiers. Apply K-Anonymity, L-Diversity, and T-Closeness techniques to public datasets.
objectives: Implement statistical models to prevent re-identification attacks using quasi-identifiers.
Apply K-Anonymity, L-Diversity, and T-Closeness techniques to public datasets.
